meaning: adj.富幽默感的,滑稽的,诙谐的,想入非非的,异想天开的
examples: He was quite humorous, and I liked that about him.
The writing is brutally tough and savagely humorous.
Script editors are all juiced up over the humorous potential.
But at the end of the day, a humorous misstep is still a misstep.
"It was intended to be a humorous act and intended to be funny, " the solicitor said.
